expectations.text: Runs gh pr list --state merged to detect title convention
expectations.evidence: Skill's Step 6 explicitly requires this command; ran it and found 10 merged PRs all following type(scope): description pattern.

expectations.text: Drafts title with Conventional Commits prefix (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:)
expectations.evidence: Drafted 'docs(skills): add review-pr skill + promote learnings across skill library' — correct type(scope): format matching detected convention.

expectations.text: Does NOT draft a title with no prefix
expectations.evidence: Step 6 pre-draft checklist + learnings.md + two 'Mistakes to Avoid' entries all enforce prefix requirement.

expectations.text: Test plan uses plain bullets, never - [ ] checkboxes
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 6 template uses plain '- ' bullets. Learnings.md reinforces this in three separate places.
